articles.title: Japan’s Core Inflation Rises to 1.8% in March, Core-Core Ticks Down
articles.expand: Japan’s inflation firmed slightly in March, but underlying dynamics were mixed. Core CPI (ex-fresh food) rose from 1.6% to 1.8% , slightly above expectations but still below the BoJ’s 2% target for a second straight month. Core-core CPI (excludes both fresh food and energy) ticked down from 2.5% to 2.4% , the lowest level since […] The ...

articles.title: Canadian Dollar steadies as US Dollar firms on safe-haven demand

The pair steadies as the US Dollar (USD) maintains its position as safe-haven demand increases amid persistent uncertainty surrounding the United States (US)–Iran conflict.
